SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF HAYDEE OFELIA FAYAD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HUNTER LEHMAN IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
